ethos.title: Our Ethos: A Fair Launch Reimagined
ethos.p1: Sleep Coin is born from the core principles of Proof-of-Participation, but re-engineered to address the economic vulnerabilities of first-generation fair launch tokens. We believe in a system that is transparent, equitable, and sustainable.
ethos.p2: Our philosophy is built on three pillars:
ethos.li1_text: Unlike tokens with infinite inflation, Sleep Coin has a hard cap and a predictable emission schedule that decays over one year. Value is derived from scarcity.
ethos.li2_text: Through a system of minting fees and transaction taxes, the protocol generates its own liquidity and rewards for stakers, creating a self-sustaining economic loop without reliance on external funding.
ethos.li3_text: The tokenomics are designed to deter whales and reward long-term participants. The Population Pressure mechanism ensures that as more people join, the inflation rate automatically adjusts, preventing the system from being controlled by a few.

tokenomics.title: Tokenomics: A Symphony of Mechanisms
tokenomics.intro: Every mechanism in Sleep Coin is designed to work in concert, creating a balanced and robust economic model.

mint_fee.title: Minting Fee (0.01 OKB)
mint_fee.p1: A small flat fee per mint batch (up to 100 units) serves as a critical anti-bot measure. This fee is the primary source of initial funding for the protocol's liquidity and staking rewards, ensuring the system can bootstrap itself from day one.

dynamic_term.title: Dynamic Max Term
dynamic_term.p1: The maximum minting term starts at 45 days and increases by 1 day every 3 days. This gives later participants a fair chance to leverage the 'time weapon' against early minters, balancing the playing field over the first year.

population_pressure.title: Population Pressure (Amplifier Adjustment)
population_pressure.p1: The Reward Amplifier, a key component in the minting formula, is not static. For every 100,000 new global ranks, the base amplifier is reduced by 2%. This acts as a natural brake on inflation as the user base grows, ensuring long-term sustainability.

time_decay.title: Time Decay (Exponential Reduction)
time_decay.p1: A powerful exponential decay function is applied to the mint reward calculation. This ensures that minting rewards trend towards near-zero after one year, creating a finite emission window and establishing a clear end to the inflationary phase.

tax.title: Transaction Tax
tax.p1: A transaction tax is in place to reward long-term holders and fund the ecosystem. The tax is structured in two phases:
tax.li1: Phase 1 (First Year): 2% Buy Tax / 4% Sell Tax.
tax.li2: Phase 2 (After One Year): 0% Buy Tax / 1% Sell Tax.

fee_distribution.title: Fee Distribution
fee_distribution.p1: All fees collected by the protocol (from minting and taxes) are distributed programmatically:
fee_distribution.li1: Until Global Rank reaches 100,000: 50% to Protocol-Owned Liquidity, 48% to OKB Staking Rewards, 2% Burned.
fee_distribution.li2: After Global Rank reaches 100,000: 100% of all fees are directed to OKB Staking Rewards, creating a powerful incentive for long-term stakers.
